message:
fix: bump npm package version to 0.50.2

Missed in the version bump commit, caused npm publish to fail
(cannot publish over existing 0.50.1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "@beads/bd",
-  "version": "0.50.1",
+  "version": "0.50.2",
   "description": "Beads issue tracker - lightweight memory system for coding agents with native binary support",
   "main": "bin/bd.js",
   "bin": {
